description: List of communal accounts dated in variety of places throughout the text, for example the first intact date on the recto is 12 Sivan 5352 AM (1592 CE). This ledger fragment is part of a broader chain of related documents from communal ledgers that Dotan Arad has identified from the years 1588-1607 CE (See PGPID 9952). Some of the names of those mentioned include: (recto) Shemuʾel Tājir, Elʿazar ʿImānī, Nissīm Buḥeyrī; (verso) Shelomo Skanderī, Yosef Porekh, Yiṣḥaq Porekh. MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
